ParseInput.purpose: Parse the input JSON to extract command and grade_data.

RouteCommand.purpose: Route the command to the appropriate handler child.
RouteCommand.signature: def RouteCommand(command: str, grade_data: dict) -> dict

HandleRecordGrade.purpose: Record a grade for a student in a course.

HandleGetStudentGrades.purpose: Retrieve all grades for a student with average, total credits, GPA.

HandleGetCourseGrades.purpose: Retrieve all grades for a course with statistics.

HandleListClassGrades.purpose: List grades for a class, optionally filtered by course.

HandleGetGradeReport.purpose: Generate a text report for a student.

HandleGetCourseStats.purpose: Compute course statistics: average, std_dev, pass rate, distribution.
